stripe_integration.title: Add Stripe subscription billing
stripe_integration.description: We need to integrate Stripe to handle monthly subscriptions. This should support webhook events for payment success/failure, send confirmation emails via SendGrid, and persist invoice records in PostgreSQL. The integration should also handle subscription upgrades/downgrades with prorated billing. Frontend needs a checkout component that uses Stripe Elements.

performance_bug.title: Dashboard loads in 8s — investigate N+1
performance_bug.description: Engineering dashboard /api/v1/dashboard/team is timing out for orgs with >50 developers. Profiler shows ~1200 queries per request, almost all of them fetching commit counts per developer in a loop. We need to switch to a single aggregated query (probably a CTE) and add a Redis cache with a 60s TTL.

frontend_only.title: Redesign the contributions heatmap
frontend_only.description: The current contributions heatmap uses recharts and feels dated. Move it to visx, add per-month tooltips with PR/commit/review breakdowns, and make it responsive on mobile. Should match the new design tokens in the Figma file.
